name: RDS instance publicly accessible
description: The RDS database instance is configured with PubliclyAccessible=true, meaning the database endpoint is resolvable from the internet. Even with a security group, this dramatically increases the attack surface.
remediation: Set PubliclyAccessible=false. Place RDS instances in private subnets. Use a bastion host, AWS PrivateLink, or RDS Proxy for access. Apply security groups restricting inbound to application subnet CIDRs only.
